North St at Sharon Ave, Anderson, CA 96007, USA

There are approximately 120 or so golden Peach trees and 120 Ruby peach trees here... Sometimes you can pick for free where as others it's about a $1 a pound to pick. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: June-August.
